checks.name: Low Image Resolution
checks.description: An image doesn't have enough detail for sharp printing.

checks.name: Excessive Resolution
checks.description: An image has far more detail than needed, increasing file size unnecessarily.

checks.name: Wrong Color Mode
checks.description: An image uses screen colors (RGB) instead of print colors (CMYK).

checks.name: No Image Compression
checks.description: An image isn't compressed, making the file unnecessarily large.

checks.name: Inline Image
checks.description: A small image is embedded directly in the page stream instead of as a resource.

checks.name: Upscaled Image
checks.description: An image has been stretched beyond its actual size, causing visible blur.

checks.name: LZW Compression
checks.description: Image uses LZW compression which is prohibited in some print standards.

checks.name: JPEG2000 Format
checks.description: Uses JPEG2000 format which may not be supported by all RIPs.

checks.name: 16-Bit Image
checks.description: Image uses 16-bit color depth, unusual for standard print workflows.

checks.name: OPI Reference
checks.description: References an external high-res image that must be available at print time.

checks.name: Alternate Image
checks.description: Contains alternate images that should be stripped before printing.

checks.name: OPI in Resources
checks.description: OPI reference found in page resources.

checks.name: Alternate in Resources
checks.description: Alternate image reference found in page resources.

checks.name: Sheared Image
checks.description: Image has a non-orthogonal transform applied (skewed).

checks.name: Rotated Image
checks.description: Image is rotated at a non-standard angle.

checks.name: Flipped Image
checks.description: Image appears to be mirrored horizontally or vertically.

checks.name: Extreme Scaling
checks.description: Image is scaled to an extreme percentage of its original size.

checks.name: Broken Image Reference
checks.description: An image XObject in page resources resolves to a missing object or a non-image type — the RIP will render a blank region where this image was placed.

checks.name: Device-Dependent Color
checks.description: Color is specified without a profile, so output will vary by device.

checks.name: Spot Color Without Fallback
checks.description: A spot color has no process color fallback for proofing.

checks.name: Lab Color Used
checks.description: CIE Lab color used — may require special handling at the RIP.

checks.name: Ink Coverage Too High
checks.description: Total ink exceeds the maximum for this paper type, risking smearing or drying issues.

checks.name: Registration Color
checks.description: All inks at 100% — only for registration marks, never for artwork.

checks.name: No Output Intent
checks.description: No color profile is specified — colors may shift unpredictably during printing.

checks.name: Mixed Color Spaces
checks.description: Different color spaces used on the same page may cause inconsistency.

checks.name: CalRGB Color
checks.description: Calibrated RGB color used — should be converted to CMYK for print.

checks.name: CalGray Color
checks.description: Calibrated gray color used — should use DeviceGray for consistency.

checks.name: Indexed Color
checks.description: Indexed/palette color used — limited color range.

checks.name: Pattern Color Space
checks.description: Pattern-based color used — may render differently across RIPs.

checks.name: Separation Color
checks.description: Separation color space detected.

checks.name: DeviceN Color
checks.description: Multi-channel DeviceN color detected.

checks.name: Color Space Inventory
checks.description: Summary of color space types used in the document.

checks.name: ICC Profile Mismatch
checks.description: Embedded ICC profile doesn't match the output intent.

checks.name: RGB in CMYK Workflow
checks.description: RGB color found in a CMYK-targeted workflow.

checks.name: Impure Black
checks.description: Black areas use unnecessary color inks, risking visible misregistration.

checks.name: Untagged Color
checks.description: Color space used without an associated ICC profile.

checks.name: Wide Gamut Color
checks.description: Color is outside the typical print gamut.

checks.name: Overink Warning
checks.description: Multiple color operations accumulate high ink levels.

checks.name: Rich Black Text
checks.description: Text uses more than one CMYK ink — pure K (100/0/0/0) is recommended at every size to avoid misregistration.

checks.name: No ICC Profile
checks.description: No ICC color profile embedded for color-managed output.

checks.name: Invalid ICC Profile
checks.description: The embedded ICC profile is corrupt or invalid.

checks.name: ICC Version Mismatch
checks.description: ICC profile version doesn't match the PDF specification.

checks.name: Wrong ICC Device Class
checks.description: ICC profile device class doesn't match usage context.

checks.name: Output intent # has unrecognized condition
checks.description: Output intent #N has unrecognized condition 'N'

checks.name: Multiple output intents have inconsistent color space
checks.description: Multiple output intents have inconsistent color space types: N

checks.name: ICC profile

checks.name: Document uses ICC profiles with different rendering

checks.name: TAC Heatmap
checks.description: Total Area Coverage data for this page.

checks.name: Ink Separation Data
checks.description: Per-channel ink usage statistics.

checks.name: Ink Channel Inventory
checks.description: Summary of all ink channels used in the document.

checks.name: Unknown Spot Color
checks.description: A spot color is used that isn't in a standard color book.

checks.name: Spot Color Fallback Issue
checks.description: The process color fallback for a spot color may not be accurate.

checks.name: Similar Spot Names
checks.description: Multiple spot colors have very similar names — may be duplicates.

checks.name: Duplicate spot color
checks.description: Duplicate spot color 'N' on page N defined N time(s) with different parameters: N

checks.name: Document uses spot color(s exceeding
checks.description: Document uses N spot color(s), exceeding the maximum of N: N

checks.name: Spot color used at 0% tint
checks.description: Spot color 'N' used at 0% tint on page N (invisible)

checks.name: Overprint On
checks.description: Overprint is enabled — colors will mix where they overlap instead of knocking out.

checks.name: Overprint Off for Spot
checks.description: Overprint is disabled for a spot color, which may cause unexpected knockouts.

checks.name: Overprint Mode Mismatch
checks.description: Overprint mode setting is inconsistent.

checks.name: White overprint on page fill
checks.description: White overprint on page N (fill is white with overprint active — content underneath will show through)

checks.name: Overprint inventory object(s with overprint enabled
checks.description: Overprint inventory: N object(s) with overprint enabled across N color space type(s)

checks.name: Overprint active with DeviceRGB
checks.description: Overprint active with DeviceRGB on page N (undefined behavior on press)

checks.name: Small black text instance min
checks.description: N small black text instanceN (min Npt) in knockout mode on page N (overprint not active — risk of misregistration)

checks.name: Registration color with overprint active
checks.description: Registration color with overprint active on page N (registration color outside marks is dangerous)

checks.name: Transparency Used
checks.description: Page uses transparency which must be flattened for older workflows.

checks.name: Non-Standard Blend Mode
checks.description: A blend mode other than Normal is used, which may flatten unpredictably.

checks.name: Soft Mask
checks.description: Image uses a soft mask, increasing rendering complexity.

checks.name: Low Opacity
checks.description: Content has very low opacity and may be nearly invisible in print.

checks.name: Transparency Group
checks.description: A transparency group is defined on this page.

checks.name: Knockout transparency group on page may
checks.description: Knockout transparency group on page N (may cause unexpected rendering)

checks.name: Shading pattern detected
checks.description: Shading pattern detected on page N (N shadingN, potential gradient banding risk)

checks.name: Missing Font
checks.description: A font is not embedded — text may display incorrectly at the printer.

checks.name: Full Font Embedded
checks.description: The entire font is embedded instead of just the characters used, increasing file size.

checks.name: System Font Used
checks.description: A standard system font is used which may render differently on other devices.

checks.name: Type 3 Font
checks.description: User-drawn Type 3 font detected — quality may vary across RIPs.

checks.name: Missing ToUnicode
checks.description: CID font is missing a ToUnicode map — text search and copy may not work.

checks.name: Missing CIDSystemInfo
checks.description: CID font is missing system information needed for correct rendering.

checks.name: No Font Encoding
checks.description: Font lacks encoding information — characters may map incorrectly.

checks.name: TrueType Not Embedded
checks.description: A TrueType font is referenced but not embedded in the file.

checks.name: OpenType Not Embedded
checks.description: An OpenType/CFF font is referenced but not embedded.

checks.name: Incomplete Font
checks.description: Font descriptor is present but the actual font data is missing.

checks.name: Multiple Master Font
checks.description: Multiple Master font detected — limited RIP support.

checks.name: Faux Bold
checks.description: Software-simulated bold detected — may not print as expected.

checks.name: Faux Italic
checks.description: Software-simulated italic detected — may not print as expected.

checks.name: Damaged Font
checks.description: The font program appears corrupt or has a type mismatch.

checks.name: Restricted Font Embedding Licence
checks.description: Font's OS/2 fsType bit advertises a licence restriction (restricted / preview-and-print / editable embedding). Verify vendor licensing before distributing this PDF.

checks.name: Small Text
checks.description: Text is below the minimum readable size for print.

checks.name: Invisible text rendering mode 3
checks.description: Invisible text (rendering mode 3) on page N (text is neither filled nor stroked)

checks.description: Thin stroked text may be hard to read at small sizes.
